subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Kingdom of God, know thou that the Word is an expression of the universal divine meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المقبله الی ملکوت الله اعلمی ان الکلمه عباره عن المعانی الکلیه الالهیه
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God the cause of creation, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
